description_long: This object is a single flower with a rounded, dense inflorescence composed of numerous small, overlapping petals in shades of pink, red, and white. The flower head is supported by a slender, reddish stem that extends downward and is attached to several elongated, glossy green leaves. The leaves are arranged alternately along the stem and exhibit a lanceolate to ovate shape, with smooth edges and a slightly curved form. The flower's surface appears textured and somewhat fuzzy, suggesting a soft, natural finish. The overall structure is delicate, with the flower head positioned terminally at the top of the stem, making it a prominent feature. This type of flower would be commonly found in urban parks, gardens, or as part of decorative landscaping.
description: A single, rounded pink flower with a dense head, supported by a reddish stem and several glossy green lanceolate leaves. The flower has a soft, textured appearance and stands out as a decorative plant.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded pink flower head, two prominent green leaves on either side, and a clear view of the reddish stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flower head's texture and a single leaf extending outward, with the stem partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the flower head and the arrangement of three leaves, with the stem fully visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the flower head's layered petals and the distribution of leaves around the stem.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are densely packed in a radial arrangement, forming a rounded, composite head with overlapping layers and no clear bilateral symmetry.
